---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Darwinia
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce
```bash
# Steps to reproduce
python -m darwinia evolve -g 10
```

## Expected behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error output if applicable.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g. 3.11]
- Darwinia version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
